command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2d1S7viP934C9u9.root --database f39rghmcCDkVuc3rBX8cym --execute SHOW CREATE TABLE vortexBets;
stdout:
Table	Create Table
vortexBets	CREATE TABLE `vortexBets` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `playerName` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `betAmount` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL,
  `multiplier` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `winAmount` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `netAmount` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `balanceAfter` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `resultData` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `isWin` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_bin
